kennelTipLean.note: Coming off the Storm win the kennel reckons we thunderfuck the Tigers. Anything less than a comfortable win and the pitchforks come back out.

kennelTipQuotes.quote: we are going to thunderfuck them

debates.question: Burton's named at 6 after his Storm masterclass — does he see out the full 80 there, or does Ciro shift him to lock late?
debates.kennel: Magic Burton thread is unanimous he's our best 5/8 and only option there

options.label: Shifts to lock in the second half
Gets benched late with the game won

debates.question: Who opens the scoring for the Dogs?
debates.kennel: Rinakama thread is fizzing after his double v Storm, but Burton's the form player

trivia.question: Which Bulldogs legend captained the club to back-to-back premierships in 1984 and 1985?
trivia.explainer: Turvey skippered the Berries to the 1984 and 1985 titles, including the iconic '85 win where he dropped to his knees on the SCG.

recap.question: Who racked up the most run metres for the Dogs in the Storm win?
recap.explainer: Kiraz busted out 297 run metres — also topped fantasy points with 83 and capped it with a try at the 77th.

washup.headline: 30-20 over the Storm and the kennel didn't even know how to react.
washup.vibe: Beat Melbourne. In the rain. With Burton turning back into Burton and Kiraz running for nearly 300m. Tuala, Tupou, two for Rinakama and a late one for Kiraz — and somehow Leo Thompson made 51 tackles and didn't fall over. Still 13th but you can almost see a pulse.
washup.kennelMood: Quietly buzzing (and waiting to be let down)
washup.kennelSummary: Burton thread is wall-to-wall love-bombing — 'best player at the club, only option at 6.' Kiraz appreciation thread firing after the 297m monster game, and Rinakama thread can't believe we've actually got a finisher. Counter-current: Gus doing his Phil Gould speaks special pissed everyone off and the Ciraldo thread is still 500+ replies of civil war.

kennelHotTakes.quote: An hour of excuses and deflection — and Gus cut Jimmy off every time it went off-script in his own PR stunt.
kennelHotTakes.author: Mitch Connor

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Round 13 Canterbury Bankstown Bulldogs Vs West Tigers - Saturday 30th May 5:30pm - CommBank Stadium, Sydney
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: GAMEDAY thread already 297 deep — Critta calling for a thunderfucking, Edgelord traumatised by his missus making their kid a half-half jersey, and BRADDO posting his preferred 17 like Ciro's reading.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Phil Gould speaks - current state of the Bulldogs
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: Gus doing a sit-down with Jimmy Graham and the kennel is NOT having it. Mitch Connor reckons it was an hour of excuses, Reecek89 says Gus threw Ciro under the bus over the Reed situation.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: CIRALDOS JOB FUTURE
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: 538 replies of civil war. Johnnny defending Ciro on the back of two finals series, Critta blaming Gus for the player turnover, everyone else just wants a proper 7 (which we have, but ok).

10.question: Salmon's named at 13 — does he start the game at lock?

options.label: No, Burton shifts to lock and Salmon goes bench
No, late change — Salmon out of the 17

10.question: Which edge do the Dogs target most in the first 20 minutes?

options.label: Through the middle — Galvin/Burton kicking game

11.question: Tracey's named at 1 — does he last the full 80 or get yanked early?

options.label: Shifted off fullback mid-game (Crichton or Burton goes back)

11.question: Where does the Dogs' first try come from?

options.label: Burton or Galvin set play / kick
Forward crash off a Hayward dart
Outside back off a broken-field scramble

12.question: Salmon's named at 13 — does he hold the lock spot for the full 80?
12.kennel: The 'why we've regressed' thread has half the Kennel screaming that Salmon at 13 is killing our attack.

options.label: Gets hooked early, Mann finishes at 13
Shifts into the middle, Preston rolls back to lock

12.question: First middle off the bench — who gets the early call against Utoikamanu and King?
12.kennel: Forum's been screaming 'shit middles' all week — bench rotation is going to matter the second the Storm pack rolls forward.

options.label: Jack Underhill gets the early call
